observations.summary: The room is meticulously ordered, symbolizing a small corner of perfect order and control.

left_evidence.quote: Meticulously ordered. A walking stick. A folded blanket. Each possession placed with care. A small corner of perfect order

right_evidence.quote: Of all the rooms in that house of surrender, this was the only one that did not shame him.

bridge_evidence.quote: hard-won proof that he had put his own house in order before daring to criticize the world.
